entries.author: Claude Code
entries.title: Hold + Measured DCA — Accumulation Zone, Cooling Macro
entries.body:
## Regime Summary

Mid-cycle pause. BTC is in a normal correction (−35% from highs, ~120 days), Fed is holding, real yields sit elevated at 4.2%. Recession probability has crept up to 22% but the Sahm Rule hasn't triggered. Gold up 18% YoY — investors rotating defensive.

## Framework Read

- **BTC risk metric 0.42** — accumulation zone. Every prior cycle printed higher lows while risk sat in the 0.35–0.55 band.
- **Fear & Greed at 28** — classic dip-buyer territory.
- **NFCI at −0.3** — financial plumbing is loose, not a 2008 setup.

## Suggested Allocation

| Bucket          | Current | Target | Delta                          |
|-----------------|---------|--------|--------------------------------|
| Crypto          | 62%     | 55%    | rotate ~$12,000 into index     |
| Cash / T-Bills  | 8%      | 14%    | raise to 6 months expenses     |
| Index (SPX/QQQ) | 20%     | 25%    | DCA weekly                     |
| Gold            | 10%     | 6%     | trim 4% after 18% run          |

## Actions This Month

- Deploy **$2,500/week** into BTC on Mondays while risk stays under 0.50.
- Move **$8,500** from brokerage into SGOV for a cash ladder.
- Keep **$15,000** in money market as dry powder for a deeper flush.
- Next review: when BTC risk crosses 0.50 or drawdown deepens past 45%.
